segments.text: Insane! He landed the triple jab into the KO! Kazuya's still got rage—that's a bit annoying. The rage is blocking grab startup... Exactly, yeah.
segments.original_text: 笑えないここ弱3段撃墜通してきましたレイジがあるカズヤが残っているちょっと邪魔だなこのレイジ投げ始動ができないんで確かにそうですねそうですね

full_text: Insane! He landed the triple jab into the KO! Kazuya's still got rage—that's a bit annoying. The rage is blocking grab startup... Exactly, yeah.
